name: USS Edward C. Daly (DE 17)
events: 29 Mar 1945 The escort carrier HMS Ranee (A/Capt. J.A.W. Tothill, DSC, RN) departed Pearl Harbor from Guam. On board were US military personnel as well as replacement aircraft.
Around 1545 M/5, the destroyer escort USS Edward C. Daly (Lt.Cdr. G.R. Deits, USNR) joined near Eniwetok. (1)

8 Apr 1945 The escort carrier HMS Ranee (A/Capt. J.A.W. Tothill, DSC, RN) arrived at Guam from Pearl Harbor. Her escort, the destroyer escort USS Edward C. Daly (Lt.Cdr. G.R. Deits, USNR), also arrived at Guam. (2)
